summary: Wrote ADR.md v2.0 with 24 ADRs (ADR-001–ADR-012 preserved from Phase 1, ADR-013–ADR-024 new for Phase 2). Each ADR follows the template format (Status, Context, Decision, Rationale, Consequences) and aligns with SAD.md v2.0 architecture. Phase 2 ADRs cover: Messenger/WhatsApp adapters (013), prompt injection defense (014), credit card Luhn check (015), emotion analyzer (016), DST 7-state FSM (017), RRF fusion k=60 (018), embedding model choice (019), SLA priority tiers (020), cosine similarity grounding (021), Prometheus library choice (022), ivfflat index config (023), golden dataset schema (024).
